name: Hot Pepper Succotash
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Cups frozen baby lima beans, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the stock in a medium nonstick skillet.
2. Add the corn and beans; sauté on high for 5 minutes.
3. Reduce heat and add the jelly; stir until it melts and coats the vegetables.
4. Add scallions and salt to taste.
(2 servings)
